title: well_trace_lineage (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `well_trace_lineage`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing well schema for `well_trace_lineage` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Memory poisoning prevention. Supersession chain must be preserved.

memory_symbol_status.description: §3.Q — Every memory must know its own symbolic status to prevent memory poisoning.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every well_trace_lineage output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
